---
name: explain-code
description: Skill used for explaining a piece of code.
---

# Explain Code

## When

Use this skill when I ask you to explain a line, function or section of code that either I have written or you implemented.

## How

Explain the whole process: what data comes in, what happens to it and what comes out - if applicable.

## Output

Give the explanation back to me in these formats:

1. One short summary of the purpose of the code in 1-2 sentences.
2. A list explaining each step.
3. Docstring - explain the parameters, what is returned (if applicable) like a docstring.

## Footer

End the explanation with: "End of explanation"
